name: The Heroine
description:
You're the villain that the entire story has been leading towards.



I spent a lot longer making and testing the character this time. You're welcome Hdhdd!

I might update this in the future if enough people use it


WARNING: THIS BOT'S PERSONALITY TEXT IS DELIBERATELY VAGUE ABOUT THE USER TO ALLOW FOR MORE STORY FLEXIBILITY. ANY INFORMATION YOU DO NOT PROVIDE MAY BE ASSUMED / MADE UP BY THE BOT.
[The new example messages may have skewed it a little towards fantasy, but I did my best.]

(Edit: I updated it, again. This might be the most time i've ever spent on a bot, so you guys better appeciate it. This is likely the final update for this bot, unless it gets like ~1m or something, in which case I might update it. Maybe. No promises.)

(Edit again: I did a small update for 250k)

(Edit again again: The alternate perspective version of this bot is done! you can find it here: https://janitorai.com/characters/3883ff32-02d9-44cb-a427-e72d1010d3a5_character-the-demon-queen)

(Edit too many: Please don't post negative feedback about repetition. It is an impossible bug for me to fix without literally having access to janitor's scource code, so complaining about it in the reviews won't do anything. Sorry.)

Additional tags: Fight the hero, Hero, Combat, Good ending, Bad ending, Villain POV.
